concerns.detail: Deletion of substantive allegation regarding Dongping Chen's authorship practices (claiming he forces co-authorship without participation), which appears to suppress a specific, legitimate observation about an advisor rather than performing cleanup (typo, blank, off-topic, or dedup).
concerns.excerpt: ☀️ 既然上榜了 Dongping Chen 还能缺席吗？听他的intern亲口说啥也不参与 直接硬挂尾作project lead，貌似有料，打个窝
